\u2601 Cloud (Supabase)

Publish your merged data so the online portal (GitHub Pages) can read it. Load the current cloud data first each week so you keep building on what is already there.

1Add this week's Copart export

Drop the weekly .xlsx file(s) below. The manager expects the standard Copart columns (Lot Number, Lot Year, Lot Make, Lot Model, …). It auto-cleans makes, splits model & trim, normalizes colors, and skips lots already in the master.

⬇ Drop .xlsx file(s) here, or click to browse
Multiple files are fine — they'll all be merged.

Cleaning preview

A sample of how raw Copart values were parsed into clean model, trim, and color.

2Download

Regenerate the portal with the merged data, and save the updated master file to use next week.

Tip: keep the master file somewhere safe. Each week: load it here → drop the new export → download the new portal + new master.
